name: fitdata
creator: vnap0v
description: The Numworks calculator has the Regression app to find polynomials which best fit given data. The calculator’s Python app has a numpy library which contains the function polyfit() for the same purpose. Another function called polyval() evaluates a polynomial for a set of x values. This script demonstrates numpy.polyfit() and numpy.polyval(). Tested on the calculator using software version 23.2.6. Also works in CPython on a PC
